description: Bootstrap issues for AI Ready U: Life. The Chief of Staff creates these on first run to initialize all domain agents.

bootstrap_issues.title: Initialize all domain agents
bootstrap_issues.description: Create onboarding tasks for every domain agent to review their vault, update their state file, and identify top priorities.

subtasks.title: Review vault and update state — tax
Review vault and update state — health
Review vault and update state — wealth
Review vault and update state — career
Review vault and update state — legal
Review vault and update state — insurance
Review vault and update state — business
Review vault and update state — estate
Review vault and update state — home
Review vault and update state — family
Review vault and update state — learning
Review vault and update state — mind
Review vault and update state — explore
Review vault and update state — vehicles

bootstrap_issues.title: Produce first Life Dashboard
bootstrap_issues.description: After all domain agents have completed their vault review, compile the first weekly Life Dashboard covering all 14 domains.

bootstrap_issues.title: Create goal-aligned tasks for current quarter
bootstrap_issues.description: Read goals.md and create specific Paperclip issues for each domain agent based on the quarterly OKRs. Every active goal should have at least one task advancing it.

bootstrap_issues.title: Scan for upcoming deadlines (next 30 days)
bootstrap_issues.description: Review all vault state files and documents for deadlines within 30 days — tax payments, insurance renewals, registration expirations, appointment scheduling, filing dates. Create tasks for each deadline.

bootstrap_issues.title: Audit vault completeness
bootstrap_issues.description: For each of the 14 vault domains, assess document completeness. Which domains have good coverage? Which are nearly empty? Create a prioritized plan for the user to populate underfilled domains.
